title: Designated Vendor Directions: approach to enforcement
body: "How the Secretary of State and officials in the Department of Science, Innovation and Technology (DSIT) will approach enforcement of requirements relating to DVDs issued under the Communications Act 2003 as amended by the Telecommunications (Security) Act 2021.  This document includes:   the background to DVDs and the powers available; the approach to enforcement action; how to establish whether there has been a contravention of a DVD requirement or determine whether to enforce against a contravention; the process for coming to a proposed penalty; issuing formal enforcement action; issuing a confirmation decision; and the governance for how decisions on enforcement are made and communicated   "
